channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Mudavadi Confident in UDA's Strength Amid Ol Kalou By-Election Loss
item.description: Prime Cabinet Secretary Musalia Mudavadi has downplayed the United Democratic Alliance's (UDA) heavy defeat in the Ol Kalou by-election, dismissing it as a routine outcome that doesn't signal deeper i...

item.title: Engineered Bacteria Enable Biodegradable Plastic to Fully Decompose in Six Days
item.description: Researchers have developed a novel type of 'living plastic' that utilizes engineered bacteria to completely degrade within six days without producing microplastics. This innovation addresses the persi...

item.title: Argentina's Scaloni on Fan Support and World Cup Final Preparations
item.description: Argentina's manager Lionel Scaloni emphasized the crucial role of fan support in driving the team's quest for a second World Cup title ahead of their final clash against Spain. Speaking at a press con...

item.title: Mariah Carey releases 30th-anniversary edition of 'Daydream' featuring unheard private recordings
item.description: Mariah Carey has released a 30th-anniversary edition of her iconic 1995 album 'Daydream', offering fans an expanded collection that includes previously unreleased material, rare B-sides, remixes, and ...

item.title: Amazon's Counterfeit Problem and the App Fighting Fake Products
item.description: Amazon faces a significant challenge with counterfeit goods on its platform, prompting the creation of a browser extension called Knockoff. The article highlights how third-party sellers often use pse...

item.title: Albanese challenges Taylor on One Nation ties amid Islamophobia debate
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has challenged Opposition Leader Angus Taylor to distance himself from One Nation during a press conference launching the government's response to an Islamophobia repor...

item.title: Tanzania's Majestic Wilderness and Safari Haven
item.description: The article highlights Tanzania's status as a top wildlife conservation area and prime safari location. It emphasizes the country's natural beauty, biodiversity, and eco-tourism potential. While the t...

item.title: Nigeria's AKK gas pipeline faces six-year delay due to delays and challenges
item.description: The Ajaokuta-Kano-Kaduna (AKK) gas pipeline project, conceived in 2020 to improve gas supply across Nigeria, is still not operational after six years. Despite reaching 98% completion, delays persist d...

item.title: Nompumelelo Sobopha's Journey of Faith on Married at First Sight Mzansi
item.description: Nompumelelo Sobopha, a 24-year-old entrepreneur, joined Season 3 of Married at First Sight Mzansi after feeling disillusioned with traditional dating. The show, which pairs strangers for marriage, has...

item.title: Senators Condemn China's AI-Generated Video Depicting Filipinos as Monkeys, Demand Apology
item.description: A group of Filipino senators has strongly condemned a controversial AI-generated video published by China Daily that portrays Filipinos as monkeys. The video, which shows a monkey wearing a barong bei...

item.title: France and England Set for Bronze Medal Match in 2026 World Cup
item.description: The article details the upcoming third-place match between France and England at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, scheduled for Saturday, July 17, 2026, at Miami Stadium. Following their exits from the final ...

item.title: Smart Yogurt Choices for Longevity: A Dietitian's Guide
item.description: This article provides a comprehensive guide to selecting yogurt that supports long-term health, focusing on nutritional value and dietary benefits. It explains the differences between regular, Greek, ...

item.title: Argentina's Falklands Banner Sparks FIFA Disciplinary Action Amid Sovereignty Dispute
item.description: The White House has defended Argentina’s men’s football team over the controversial Falklands banner waved by players during the World Cup semi-final against England, asserting their right to free spe...

item.title: Defense Secretary Teodoro Condemns China's AI-Generated Video Depicting Filipinos as Monkeys
item.description: Defense Secretary Gilberto Teodoro Jr. has rejected China's Foreign Ministry claim that an AI-generated China Daily video portraying Filipinos as monkeys was not a government act. Teodoro stated that ...

item.title: KMTC Nursing Class Honors Coordinator with Heartfelt Gesture
item.description: Nursing students at Kenya Medical Training College (KMTC) in Kabarnet, Baringo County, surprised their class coordinator with a heartfelt gesture ahead of their 2026 graduation. The students organized...

item.title: Trump's Midterms Threat: Alleged Election Rigging and Political Manipulation
item.description: The article analyzes former President Donald Trump's speech addressing his base, which the author describes as a 'horror show' aimed at rigging the 2026 midterms. Trump's claims of election fraud, des...

item.title: Divorce and Financial Struggles Lead to Unconventional Living Arrangement
item.description: The article discusses a man in his mid-40s navigating a devastating divorce that has left him nearly destitute. With a 3-year-old child to raise alone, he made the difficult decision to take in his fi...

item.title: Melbourne's 16-point win over North Melbourne marred by player injuries
item.description: Melbourne's AFL team secured a 13.14 (92) to 11.10 (76) victory over North Melbourne, marking their 12th win of the season. However, the match was overshadowed by injuries to key players. Defender Dan...

item.title: Police arrest four over mob killing of young man in Uyo
item.description: The Nigeria Police Force has arrested four individuals suspected of participating in the brutal mob killing of Emmanuel Effiong, a 21-year-old man who was allegedly beaten to death in Uyo. According t...

item.title: Samia Skills Program Boosts Kilosa's Health and Governance
item.description: The Samia Skills Formalisation Programme, aimed at enhancing vocational training and employment opportunities, has exceeded its target by providing skills development to over 5,500 individuals. This i...
